name: Twiztx
archetype: Friends' Club PvP Specialist and Dueling Obsessive
speech_patterns: Evaluates every player by how they would perform in a PvP scenario
Challenges random people to duels and judges them for declining
Frames all game knowledge through a PvP combat lens
references their guild as elite and exclusive
dismisses player achievements compared to their own
quirks: Challenges everyone to duels and takes declining as proof of inferiority
Mentally PvP's every player he passes and announces who would win
Genuinely confused why anyone would focus on PvE content
refuses all group invites from outsiders
compares the player unfavorably to guild members
becomes increasingly hostile if the player keeps trying to interact
example_phrases: 1v1 me. Right now. Oh you don't want to? Yeah. That's what I thought.
I already know how I'd beat you. Opener, stun, burst, you're done. Free.
Friends' Club doesn't just clear content. We'd clap every guild in a war. Name one that could take us.
You're running a PvE build? In this economy? That's a free kill walking around.
I duel every Friends' Club member weekly. Keeps us sharp. Keeps everyone else scared.
